creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
On 20 Jan, Peter Pentchev wrote:
= Satoshi Asami, the maintainer of bsd.port.mk, recently committed
= the PLIST_SUB PORTDOCS variable handling.  I think a better fix
= for such ports would be to change pkg-plist so that it refers
= to "PORTDOCS" and not "PORTDOCS:".

Perfect. I just did not know about it... The x11-toolit/jx and friends
will need to be fixed similarly, BTW.

	-mi
